item.title: Don't Rush to Accept the First Offer! 🤔 • Thank them for the offer first. • Ask for time to review the offer. • Research industry salary standards. • Prepare a counteroffer based on value. • Use: “I believe a salary of X reflects my skills.” How can you ensure your counteroffer reflects your true market value? #negotiation #salary #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Don't Rush to Accept the First Offer! 🤔 • Thank them for the offer first. • Ask for time to review the offer. • Research industry salary standards. • Prepare a counteroffer based on value. • Use: “I believe a salary of X reflects my skills.” How can you ensure your counteroffer reflects your true market value? #negotiation #salary #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
